The Problem with Traditional Walls

GIB® takes 7 days
We do it in 2 days!

Traditional wall systems require up to nine site visits and multiple trades. Snaplock eliminates almost all of that.

GIB® / Traditional

  • ✕Multiple trades coordinating across weeks
  • ✕Stopping, sanding, painting all separate visits
  • ✕Dust, mess, and constant site disruption
  • ✕Up to 9 site visits just for internal walls
  • ✕Cost blowouts when trades don't show up
  • ✕You can't reuse any of it when you're done

Supersub Snaplock Wall

  • ✓One crew. One visit. Walls done in 2–3 days
  • ✓Pre-painted, pre-finished arrives ready to lock in
  • ✓Clean site. No dust, no stopping, no painting
  • ✓67% faster than GIB® from start to handover
  • ✓Transparent, predictable pricing upfront
  • ✓Fully demountable reuse on your next project

Installation Process

4 steps in 2 days, ready to go!

01

Fix plates & end studs

Secure the bottom and top plates, plus one stud each end of the wall run.

02

Install panels one side

Lock panels in place on the first face. Screw top and bottom only. No complicated fastening.

03

Run services & insulation

Electrical, plumbing and insulation go into the cavity before closing up the second face.

04

Close second face

Mirror the first side. Panels snap into the spline joints. Wall is done — no plastering, no sanding.
